tasks.label: Install log_processor debug dependencies
tasks.command: .venv/bin/python -c "import boto3, sys; assert sys.version_info[:2] == (3, 12)" 2>/dev/null || (python3.12 -m venv --clear .venv && .venv/bin/python -m ensurepip --upgrade && .venv/bin/python -m pip install -r lambdas/log_processor/requirements.txt)

tasks.label: Start DynamoDB Local
tasks.command: docker compose up -d --wait dynamodb-local && docker compose run --rm dynamodb-setup
